engines.npm: Please use yarn instead of NPM to install dependencies
engines.pnpm: Please use yarn instead of PNPM to install dependencies

scripts.b:all: yarn b:formatero && yarn b:lintero && yarn b:monorepo && yarn b:testero
scripts.c:all: yarn c:formatero && yarn c:lintero && yarn c:monorepo && yarn c:testero
scripts.c:formatero: yarn t:formatero && yarn b:formatero && yarn et:formatero
scripts.c:lintero: yarn t:lintero && yarn b:lintero && yarn et:lintero
scripts.c:monorepo: yarn t:monorepo && yarn b:monorepo && yarn et:monorepo
scripts.c:testero: yarn t:testero && yarn b:testero && yarn et:testero
scripts.ct:all: yarn ct:formatero && yarn ct:lintero && yarn ct:monorepo && yarn ct:testero
scripts.et:all: yarn et:formatero && yarn et:lintero && yarn et:monorepo && yarn et:testero
scripts.p:all: yarn p:formatero && yarn p:lintero && yarn p:monorepo && yarn p:testero
scripts.p:formatero: cd packages/formatero && yarn npm publish --access public --tolerate-republish
scripts.p:lintero: cd packages/lintero && yarn npm publish --access public --tolerate-republish
scripts.p:monorepo: cd packages/monorepo && yarn npm publish --access public --tolerate-republish
scripts.p:testero: cd packages/testero && yarn npm publish --access public --tolerate-republish
